threatPanel.title: THREAT ANALYSIS
threatPanel.codeComment: ⚠ DANGER: Source of frontend call not validated, executing high-privilege operation directly

messages: Directive: Locate external entry points, trace Intents, identify WebView injection surfaces
Target packer detected: Bangbang Enterprise Edition, activating ART ClassLinker observation chain
LoadMethod interception active, captured 3 deferred CodeItem restorations, entering DEX repair pipeline
Unpack complete: Intercepted 12 plaintext DEX files, repaired 847 method bodies, code baseline exported
Manifest scan done: Found 14 exported Activities, 7 with intent-filters
Found 1clink:// Deeplink scheme parsing logic, located WebViewActivity critical sink
Security Alert: WebView exposes @JavascriptInterface, executeCommand() directly calls Runtime.exec()
Request deep analysis of executeCommand call chain — confirm if parameter validation or auth exists
Call chain traced: cmd parameter reaches exec() unfiltered — no auth, no whitelist, no sandbox
Also found FileReaderBridge.readFile() exposed to JS — arbitrary read of /data directory possible
Generate verification strategy: Trigger 1clink:// via am start with injected Payload, consume runtime logs
Deeplink trigger successful: WebViewActivity launched, URL loading flow captured by HookLogic
JS injection verified: executeCommand('system:id') returned uid=10086, command execution confirmed
Expand verification scope: Test FileReaderBridge, attempt read of /data/data/com.geely.vehicle.control/shared_prefs/
File read PoC successful: Obtained token.xml containing plaintext access_token and vehicle_bindid
Evaluate attack chain completeness: Deeplink → WebView → JS Bridge → RCE / File Read
Attack chain assessment complete: Both independent chains exploitable with zero interaction, CVSS 9.8 Critical recommended
Supplementary evidence: Exported 3 DEX diffs and hook trace logs for PoC replay and reproduction
Generate full PoC script including adb trigger commands and expected response assertions
PoC script generated: Contains Deeplink trigger, JS injection, and response validation — supports one-click reproduction
